name: Chayote Caviar Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the minced shallots, Dijon mustard, thin soy sauce, lemon juice, and ground white pepper in a bowl.
2. Slowly whisk in the oil until well combined.
3. Toss three-quarters of the vinaigrette with the julienned chayote and red bell pepper.
4. Combine the remaining vinaigrette with the caviar and chive batons.
5. Spoon the salad onto a plate lined with thinly sliced gravlox.
6. Place a small amount of salad in the center of the plate.
7. Drizzle with vinaigrette.
8. Yield: 12 to 16 portions.
(Note: This recipe was provided by Chef du Jour DJ9306 from Minnie@juno.com on October 25, 1996.)
